repos_pt:
[rust-db-restapi](https://github.com/caiocampos/rust-db-restapi) - Rust Servidor rust simples com conexão ao PostgresSQL

[primes](https://github.com/caiocampos/primes) - Rust Biblioteca WebAssembly (Wasm) criada em Rust para efetuar diversos cálculos relacionados à números primos (página utilizando Angular 22). Pacote npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes

[Go-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Go-Random-Stuff) - Go Projetos variados em Go
repos_en:
[rust-db-restapi](https://github.com/caiocampos/rust-db-restapi) - Rust Simple rust server with PostgresSQL connection

[primes](https://github.com/caiocampos/primes) - Rust WebAssembly Library (Wasm) created in Rust to perform several calculations related to prime numbers (page using Angular 22). npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes

[Go-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Go-Random-Stuff) - Go Miscellaneous projects in Go
